summary_en: ¥5.00/share (reinstated from ¥0.00). ¥32M total. Record date 2026-03-31, effective 2026-06-11. Sourced from retained earnings. First dividend in two years.
title_en: Notice of Dividend of Surplus (Dividend Reinstatement)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Kinzoku Co., Ltd. announced on 14 May 2026 that its board of directors resolved to pay a dividend of ¥5.00 per share for the fiscal year ended 31 March 2026, with a record date of 31 March 2026 and an effective date of 11 June 2026. The total dividend amount is ¥32 million, sourced from retained earnings. This marks the reinstatement of dividends after two years of suspension (no dividend was paid in FY3/25). The company's dividend policy prioritizes stable and continuous profit return while strengthening financial health and maintaining sustainable dividend levels based on business performance and economic conditions.
